channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mommy Ganda's Journey to Finding Love Beyond Borders
item.description: Mommy Ganda, a well-loved figure in Philippine entertainment, shared a personal and heartfelt story on the latest episode of *Kapamilya Deal or No Deal*. She revealed that in the past, she had prayed ...

item.title: Obidient Movement Urges Calm As Peter Obi Holds Political Consultations
item.description: The Obidient Movement don come out talk to their supporters as rumours dey spread say their main leader, Peter Obi, fit defect go another political party, the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC). The Na...

item.title: Teenager arrested following bomb hoax during Peter Kay performance
item.description: A teenager has been charged and named following a bomb hoax at a Peter Kay comedy show. The incident occurred at one of the popular comedian's performances, sparking an immediate response from the aut...

item.title: Oscars Establish New Rules Requiring Human Performances and Screenwriting
item.description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has introduced new eligibility rules for the Oscars that directly address the growing use of generative artificial intelligence in filmmaking. Under the...

item.title: CBI takes custody of two fugitives from UAE in multi-crore fraud cases
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI), in close coordination with the Ministry of External Affairs and Ministry of Home Affairs, has successfully brought back two high-profile fugitives from the U...

item.title: Indian Relay Teams Miss Finals at World Athletics Relays but Will Compete for 2027 Championships Qualification
item.description: On the opening day of the World Athletics Relays in Gaborone, Botswana, all five Indian quartets failed to secure a place in the final rounds of their respective events. This means they have missed th...

item.title: Starting Positions for the Miami Grand Prix 2026
item.description: Formula 1 returns to action after a five-week hiatus, with the Miami Grand Prix marking the fourth race of the 2026 season and the second sprint weekend of the year. The enforced break followed the ca...

item.title: Fathers Criticise Insufficient Paternity Leave in the UK
item.description: Many fathers in the UK feel that the statutory two-week paternity leave is grossly inadequate, leaving them unable to fully support their partners during the crucial early stages of parenthood. Numero...

item.title: Arsenal beat Fulham 3-0 as Gyokeres and Saka shine, move six points clear
item.description: Arsenal carry big form this season as dem show dem skills against Fulham for Emirates Stadium. Viktor Gyokeres shine well, score two goals and give one assist, while Bukayo Saka also score and give on...

item.title: Uhuru Kenyatta Pushes Back Against Calls to Quit Politics, Defends Jubilee Party Role
item.description: Former President Uhuru Kenyatta has responded firmly to calls from some political figures allied to President William Ruto, asking him to retire from public life. Speaking to Jubilee supporters in Nar...

item.title: Weekly Entertainment News: Constance Githinji’s Death, Njugush Divorce, and Rongai Apartment Details
item.description: This week, the Kenyan entertainment scene was abuzz with several notable stories. Murang'a University student and social media influencer Constance Githinji tragically passed away after falling from t...

item.title: Allegations Link Ekiti Airport Funds to Amandla Resort Project in Ogun
item.description: Reports dey suggest say former Ekiti State Governor, Kayode Fayemi, dey face fresh allegations say funds wey suppose for Ekiti State Airport project no reach there, e use am take build Amandla Resort ...

item.title: Obidient Movement urges supporters to stay calm as Peter Obi consults stakeholders ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: The Obidient Movement don come out to calm supporters as rumours dey fly say Peter Obi fit change political direction ahead of the 2027 presidential election. According to statement wey Yunusa Tanko, ...

item.title: F1 Miami GP Updates: Qualifying Time, Schedule, and Sprint Race Results
item.description: The F1 Miami Grand Prix weekend is underway, with qualifying set to start at 9pm BST on Saturday. Following a five-week break, the race at the Miami International Autodrome is eagerly anticipated. Mer...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford speaks on Canada-U.S. trade ties at Michigan university
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford received an honorary doctorate from Saginaw Valley State University in Michigan, where he delivered a commencement address to graduates. In his speech, Ford reflected on his ...

item.title: Kenneth Okonkwo Says Presidential Aspirants Leaving ADC Are Compromised
item.description: Kenneth Okonkwo, one big oga for African Democratic Congress (ADC), don yarn say any aspirant wey waka comot from the party after dem no get the presidential ticket dey work for President Bola Tinubu....

item.title: Three people found dead in Rosemeadow after violent assault
item.description: Three people have tragically lost their lives following a violent attack in the south-western suburbs of Sydney. Police responded to an emergency call around 1:30am on Sunday, finding the bodies of a ...

item.title: LIV Golf’s Challenges Could Reshape the PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf made a dramatic entrance into the world of professional golf, backed by big money and a bold mission to challenge the traditional PGA Tour. Its approach, combining entertainment, music, and s...

item.title: Spirit Airlines ceases operations, affecting Canadian travellers
item.description: Spirit Airlines, a Florida-based budget carrier, has announced the immediate cessation of all operations, cancelling all flights and advising passengers not to go to airports. The company cited escala...

item.title: Sinemivuyo Mpulu celebrates Top Billing debut as show returns to television
item.description: South African voiceover artist and content creator Sinemivuyo Mpulu recently marked a significant moment in his career by hosting a watch party for his debut appearance on the revived television show ...
